settings.heading: Fair Usage Policy
settings.text: Each subscriber is entitled to receive one free item per day. This applies to all complimentary products, including steaks, burgers, and other promotional items.

settings.heading: Delivery Timing
settings.text: Subscribers can enjoy free delivery within their chosen time-slot in specified regions. Ensure your delivery location falls within the service area for uninterrupted service.

settings.heading: Customizable Orders
settings.text: You can customize your Meatbox subscription with your preferred cuts, but changes must be made at least 24 hours before your next scheduled delivery.

settings.heading: Subscription Pause
settings.text: Subscribers can pause their subscription for up to one month per year. Reactivation requests should be submitted at least 48 hours in advance.

settings.heading: Payment Terms
settings.text: All subscriptions are prepaid, and renewal charges are processed automatically unless canceled before the billing date.

settings.heading: Refund Policy
settings.text: Refunds are not available for delivered items. However, in case of a quality issue, replacements can be requested within 24 hours of delivery.

settings.heading: Policy Updates
settings.text: MLS reserves the right to modify subscription policies at any time. Subscribers will be notified of changes via email or on the official website.
Have questions about your order, or a general enquiry?
